message: Jake
Kristy
Well
, welcome.
Seems like Guy has really perked up since he got back.
Of course. That's a silly question,
Oh
What do you need?
See
Talk

It's unified with a feminine and calm decor. The building itself is an old one with history, and it seems the room was arranged with the same feeling.
Well-kept potted plants and a neatly cleaned interior.
It's clear how much care has gone into this room.
Everywhere
the scent of life can be sensed. It's not hard to imagine how much time is spent in this room.
It's hard to believe he was looking so unhealthy just a little while ago. Has Guy's return completely healed him?
It's unbelievable that he was mentally ill just a short while ago.
He looks completely back to his old self.
He shows no signs of restlessness or fear. I wonder how he can recover so easily.
The party was fun, wasn't it?
Yeah, but it was a bit sad that the number of people was less than in Boston.
That's true. Cindy and Gloria.
Meryl too, with something like that.
Is my heart feeling so cheerful because it's already spring?
It must be because you’re burning with love.
Oh come on, don't tease me.
Although I did cause some trouble.
But I'm okay now.
Things are surprisingly going well with Guy. Maybe it's because I haven't seen him in a while, but he’s being really sweet.
That's great! I'm sure since you stopped seeing each other,
you realized how important he is.
I hope that's the case.
But I still can't let my guard down.
But Guy doesn't tell me where he was or what he was doing. I wonder why.
He probably didn't have any good memories, after all, he was practically under house arrest.
That may be true, but still,
he could share something with me.
I wish he'd stop keeping secrets, I want to hear everything.
I’m not in counseling anymore. Since Guy came back, we talk and meet almost every day.
I see, if you have Guy, you don’t need a doctor.
Exactly. He's my handy no-doctor-needed guy. Hehe.
I bet Guy is sneezing around now.
Do you think I should continue with counseling?
If you have the time, I think it wouldn’t hurt to do it.
Right.
Actually, Guy told me the same thing, but since he’s the reason I ended up like this in the first place.
That’s why I thought there was no need to go.
Yes, that’s right.
I don't need it anymore, it's not like it’s free.
What on earth is he thinking?
Huh!?
Are you trying to say I'm the killer?!
What are you so upset about? I never said you were the killer.
It's just that
I felt like you were looking at me with scary eyes.
This isn't something that doesn't concern me. Gai wasn't the killer either.
So please stop talking about that.
Is there something bothering you?
Bothering me about what? Don't say random things. It's unpleasant.
I don't want to hear about it anymore, just stop it already!
Gai is back, so I guess I don’t have to worry.
You get all worked up when the talk turns to the serial murder case. I wonder what bothers you.
You can't be the killer, right?
Thinking about Günter makes me anxious.
Could it be that Kristy is involved in the serial murder case?
Now that Gai is back,
it seems like he's recovering. After all,
I guess I need Gai.
You don’t talk at all about those memories of being under house arrest.
I thought you’d at least say something to Kristy.
It seems like there are still things you are hiding from me.
It seems like there are still things being kept from me.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
